name: Reasoning Agent — Conflicting Context
description: Tests contradiction detection: agent asks before overwriting conflicting data, but applies explicit corrections directly.

parts.text:
Today's date: 2026-03-28 (Saturday)

<user_message>
My flight to Paris is on April 10th
</user_message>

[{"id": "thing-801", "title": "Flight to Paris", "type_hint": "event", "data": {"date": "2026-04-15", "airline": "Air France", "flight": "AF123"}}]
